data.title: Fortuna meets 2025 production goal with 317,001 GEO, issues 2026 outlook. News release in U.S. dollars.
data.description: Fortuna Mining Corp. (NYSE: FSM) (TSX: FVI) based in Vancouver, British Columbia, announced their production results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 from their mines in Latin America and West Africa. The company successfully met its annual production target for 2025 by delivering 317,001 gold equivalent ounces ("GEO"). All financial figures mentioned are denoted in U.S. dollars.

data.title: Teledyne FLIR Defense wins $32M contract to provide surveillance kit for Bulgaria's Strykers.
data.description: Teledyne FLIR Defense, a division of Teledyne Technologies Incorporated, has secured a lucrative contract from the U.S. Army valued at up to $32 million. The contract involves supplying and incorporating cutting-edge electro-optical (EO/IR) systems into the Stryker Infantry Carrier Vehicle (ICV) Recon Kit. This significant deal was granted by the U.S. Army Contracting Command based at Aberdeen Proving Ground, Md., under a Foreign Military Sales agreement aimed at bolstering Bulgaria’s military advancement efforts.

data.title: RoboSense sells 303,000 LiDAR units in 2025, a 1,142% increase from previous year, ranking No. 1.
data.description: In Shenzhen, China, on January 15, 2026, RoboSense (stock symbol: 2498.HK), a leader in AI-driven robotics technology, revealed that it sold 303,000 LiDAR units for robotics in 2025, making it the top seller in the industry*. This marks a remarkable 1,141.8% increase compared to the previous year.

data.title: Dogecoin down 3% with 9.60% drop in trading volume. Analyst predicts 30% upside if resistance is broken.
data.description: On Wednesday, Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) experienced a slight decline, despite an analyst pointing out a bullish technical pattern indicating significant potential for growth. The memecoin, known for its dog theme, saw a decrease of over 3%, accompanied by a 9.60% drop in trading volume within the last day. This downturn was more pronounced compared to other major cryptocurrencies like Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH), XRP (CRYPTO: XRP), and Solana (CRYPTO: SOL). The market setback occurred as discussions on cryptocurrency market structure legislation faced another delay, affecting federal regulatory efforts. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Successful cadaver dissection class convened in Thailand with leading experts from Asia-Pacific countries at "Moyom Biotech • Aphranel Global Expert Advisory Panel • Thailand Anatomy Exchange Conference."
data.description: On January 14, 2026, the first-ever "Moyom Biotech • Aphranel Global Expert Advisory Panel • Thailand Anatomy Exchange Conference" took place in Bangkok. This significant event brought together experts from various Asia-Pacific nations. The conference aimed to facilitate the exchange of knowledge and expertise among professionals in the field, with a focus on anatomical sciences and biotechnology.
